description: Cross-chunk skylight seams: skylight floods in world-space into lit neighbours, so lighting is continuous across chunk borders. Toggling chunk.lit off to 'fix' seam artifacts blanks the whole world.
resolution: Never disable chunk.lit; diagnose the world-space flood propagation into neighbour chunks instead.

name: live-pose-tuning-via-eval
description: Tuning 3D overlay poses (held items, the bare arm) numerically is guesswork; instead freeze the per-frame pose writer in the running preview (patch __game.held.update to a no-op), set position/rotation via eval, screenshot, iterate, then bake the final numbers into code and re-verify with the real update loop. Use rotation.order = 'YXZ' for limbs so yaw/pitch/roll read naturally
